dual-audience floor (REQ-DA-STRUCT-1..5) の検出を実証する fixture。 各 card は 1 違反のみを孤立させる。 901-905 = verbose section.req form、 911-915 = compact details.spec-row form。 両 form が floor の data-audience-keyed 走査で同一に被覆されることを実証する (ADR-0033 §2.5 / rules §7.2 2-form)。

REQ-DA-901Ubiquitous

machine 対応部が無い孤立 human card (REQ-DA-STRUCT-1 違反)。

REQ-DA-999Ubiquitous

section id と badge id が不一致 (REQ-DA-STRUCT-2 違反)。

normative (machine)

REQ-DA-902: The system SHALL hold.

REQ-DA-903Ubiquitous

data-audience に machine|human 以外の値 reviewer (REQ-DA-STRUCT-3 違反)。

normative (machine)

REQ-DA-903: The system SHALL hold.

REQ-DA-904Ubiquitous

machine 部に aria-hidden が付き AI/AT から不可視化 (REQ-DA-STRUCT-4 違反)。

normative (machine)

REQ-DA-904: The system SHALL hold.

REQ-DA-905Ubiquitous

human badge (ubiquitous) と machine data-ears-pattern (event-driven) 不一致 (REQ-DA-STRUCT-5 違反)。

normative (machine)

REQ-DA-905: WHEN x occurs, the system SHALL hold.

REQ-DA-911Ubiq.spec-row form の孤立 human (machine 対応部なし、 REQ-DA-STRUCT-1 違反)。
REQ-DA-998Ubiq.spec-row form の id 不一致 (REQ-DA-STRUCT-2 違反)。

REQ-DA-912: The system SHALL hold.

REQ-DA-913Ubiq.spec-row form の data-audience 値域違反 bot (REQ-DA-STRUCT-3 違反)。

REQ-DA-913: The system SHALL hold.

REQ-DA-914Ubiq.spec-row form の machine 部 aria-hidden (REQ-DA-STRUCT-4 違反)。

REQ-DA-914: The system SHALL hold.

REQ-DA-915Ubiq.spec-row form の EARS-pattern 不一致 (REQ-DA-STRUCT-5 違反)。

REQ-DA-915: WHEN x occurs, the system SHALL hold.
